title: Francis Cummins
description: English RL coach and former GB, England & Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract: Francis Cummins (born 12 October 1976) is the former Head Coach of the Widnes Vikings in the Super League and an English professional rugby league coach and former player. He was the head coach of Super League team the Bradford Bulls from September 2012 until July 2014. A Great Britain and England international representative wing, Cummins also played for Ireland at fullback, and played his entire professional career with the Leeds Rhinos, with whom he won the 1999 Challenge Cup Final.
